message:
Add validate-publication.ts script for transcript leak detection

Comprehensive CI validator for transcript safety before publication:
- API key detection: OpenAI (sk-*), GitHub (ghp_*), Anthropic (sk-ant-*), AWS (AKIA*)
- Secret field detection: password, token, secret, api_key fields
- Bearer token detection
- Environment variable assignment detection
- Unredacted path detection: macOS, Linux, Windows user paths
- Private key and SSH key detection
- Email address and private IP warnings

Exits non-zero on errors, supports --strict mode for treating warnings as errors.
Part of the transcript publication pipeline with redact-transcript.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
